patch.value: Context: pm-ops main already removed host-specific real-data paths by using PM_OPS_TEST_REPOS, but its package metadata still referenced older pm CLI and pm-changelog versions.\n\nScope: update peer/dev dependency pins to the current pm CLI 2026.7.5 and pm-changelog 2026.6.30, regenerate package-lock, run release checks, and refresh CHANGELOG.md.
Refresh pm-ops to latest pm CLI and changelog toolchain

author: codex

value.author: codex
value.text: Verified privacy finding before editing: current origin/main uses PM_OPS_TEST_REPOS for optional real-data tests and contains no hard-coded /home/steve repository constants in test/ops.test.ts. Implemented package metadata refresh to @unbrained/pm-cli 2026.7.5 and pm-changelog 2026.6.30, then regenerated package-lock with npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts.

message: Record pm-ops privacy verification and toolchain refresh

patch.value: Updated peer/dev dependency pins and regenerated package-lock after confirming PM_OPS_TEST_REPOS based real-data tests are portable.
pm-ops release checks use @unbrained/pm-cli 2026.7.5 and pm-changelog 2026.6.30 without exposing local paths.
package.json/package-lock resolve latest toolchain versions; current tests contain no /home/steve constants.
pm-ops now targets the latest pm CLI and pm-changelog versions, and the current test suite remains free of host-specific real-data paths.
